dominants.dominant_desc:
TIPS & TRICKS
BUSH CHECK: Shoot S2 into bushes. If it explodes, an enemy is hiding there! 🔍
ULT TIMING: Use Ultimate when enemies use their "Big Skills" to cancel their burst. ⏳
PASSIVE: Give your Flower to the Jungler or Marksman immediately. 🌸
⚠️ LANING PRECAUTIONS
STAY BACK: Always stand behind your tank or marksman. 🛡️
MAP AWARE: Watch teammate HP bars (top left) to heal them from across the map. 🗺️
MANA CHECK: Don't spam S1 early; save mana for the big saves! 💧
⚔️ TEAMFIGHT STRATEGY
THE COMBO: S2 (Stun) ➡️ Revitalize ➡️ S1 (Heal) ➡️ Ultimate. ✨
REVITALIZE: Drop it in the middle of your team to boost all healing by 25%! ➕
STUN FOCUS: Save your S2 to stop enemies like Odette or Gusion from diving. 🛑
⚙️ BEST BUILD (2026)
Lantern (Passive) 💡
Demon Shoes (Mana) 👟
Flask of Oasis (Shield) 🧪
Fleeting Time (Fast Ult) 🕒
Glowing Wand (Anti-heal) 🔥
Immortality (2nd Life) 👼
✨ EMBLEM SETS
SET 1 (SPEED): Agility 🏃 + Wilderness 🏞️ + Focusing Mark 🎯
SET 2 (SPAM): Inspire ⚡ + Pull Yourself Together ⏳ + Temporal Reign 🔄

emblems.emblem_desc:
Why this set? 
Agility: Survival. Floryn has no dash. This extra speed helps you dodge enemies and stay in a safe position.
Wilderness Blessing: Fast Rotations. You move 10% faster in the river. This lets you roam between lanes quickly to heal teammates who need help.
Focusing Mark: Team Kill Power. When you hit an enemy with a skill, your teammates deal 6% more damage to them. It helps your carry secure kills faster.
In short: You stay safe, move fast, and make your team hit harder.
This set is for constant healing, frequent Revitalize usage, and spamming stuns.

equips.equip_desc:
Demon Shoes: Infinite Mana.
Flask of the Oasis: Extra Shields.
Fleeting Time: More Ultimates.
Glowing Wand: Damage & Anti-heal.
Immortality: Safety/Second Chance.
Quick Tip: If the enemy team has a lot of Magic Damage (like Gusion or Eudora), swap Glowing Wand for Athena's Shield to stay alive longer!

hero.hero_overview: Floryn is a Global Support who specializes in map-wide healing and CC. She is best played as a backline "nanny" for a hyper-carry.
hero.hero_strength:
Strengths
Global Presence: Her Ultimate heals all teammates instantly, no matter where they are on the map.
Anti-Heal Counter: Her evolved Ultimate briefly ignores and removes enemy "Life Drain" (Anti-heal) effects.
Free Stats: Her passive gives a teammate an extra item (Flower of Hope) that grants them bonus stats without costing a gold slot.
Decent CC: She has a long-range stun that can disrupt multiple enemies in a tight area.
hero.hero_weakness:
Weaknesses
Zero Mobility: She has no dash or escape skills, making her an easy target for assassins like Helcurt or Gusion.
Squishy: She has very low base HP and physical defense.
Item Slot Constraint: Floryn herself must keep the "Lantern" in one of her 6 item slots, slightly limiting her late-game build variety.
Delayed Stun: Her Skill 2 stun is a projectile that takes time to travel and explode, making it dodgeable.

data.recommend:
FLORYN: UNKILLABLE SQUAD GUIDE 
Short Description: Best Emblems, Build, and Tips. Turn your team into a fountain with Revitalize and Flask of the Oasis!

spell.spell_desc:
Why Revitalize?
It boosts all incoming healing and shields by 25%. When dropped during a teamfight, it turns Floryn into a "fountain," making it nearly impossible for the enemy to burst down your teammates.
Pro Tips & Techniques
The Global Save: Use your Ultimate the moment an enemy hero commits their "Big Move." Don't wait for teammates to be almost dead; use it to negate the enemy's momentum.
Skill 2 Stun: Aim the end of the skill path directly at the enemy. The explosion at the tip is what triggers the stun.
The Seed (Skill 1): Use it on minions or creeps if heroes aren't nearby; the healing bounce still works to keep you and your duo healthy.
Passive Priority: Give your Flower of Hope to your strongest carry (Jungler or Marksman) immediately to give them an extra item slot advantage.
Bottom Line: Stay in the backline, watch the map, and time your heal to cancel out enemy burst damage.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Floryn pairs well with Karina because she enables Karinas high-risk dive playstyle. Karina needs to survive long enough to secure resets, and Floryns global heal, sustained recovery, and anti-heal removal keep her alive during deep engages. This allows Karina to dive aggressively, chain kills, and escape safely while Floryns healing and control make Karinas snowball potential more consistent and less punishable.

counters.counter_desc: Estes counters Floryn because he provides stronger and more consistent AoE healing in grouped team fights. While Floryn relies on timed heals and cooldowns, Estes sustains his team continuously allowing them to outlast Floryns burst healing in long front to back engagements.

dominants.dominant_desc: During the dominant stage, Floryns role is to protect the lead and prevent throw plays rather than chase kills. Stay behind your strongest carry and share Dew with the most fed core to make them nearly unkillable. Save your ultimate for objectives, tower dives, or enemy counter-engages, not small skirmishes, since its presence alone discourages fights. Use Revitalize to control key areas like towers, Lord pit, and choke points, forcing enemies to back off from extended fights. Focus on peeling with Skill 2 to stop divers instead of initiating, poke safely with Skill 1 from the backline, and maintain disciplined positioning. Even when ahead, play with a late-game mindset—hold your cooldowns, avoid overexposure, and turn every fight into a safe, sustained win for your team.

emblems.emblem_desc: This emblem set is chosen for Floryn because it focuses on cooldown reduction, healing efficiency, and survivability, which are her core needs as a pure support. The Support Emblem enhances her healing output and utility, while Inspire (5% CDR) allows her to cast Skill 1 and Ultimate more often, giving consistent sustain in team fights. The selected talents prioritize staying alive and keeping teammates healthy rather than dealing damage, making Floryn more effective in extended fights, objective contests, and late-game clashes where frequent heals and timely ultimates can decide the game.

equips.equip_desc: This build is focused on maximum healing uptime, cooldown reduction, and survivability for Floryn. Demon Boots (Favor) solves mana issues early and boosts team healing through roam effects. Flask of the Oasis strengthens Floryns burst healing, especially when allies drop low making her ultimate and Skill 1 more impactful in team fights. Fleeting Time reduces ultimate cooldown on assists, allowing more frequent global heals during prolonged fights. Holy Crystal increases magic power directly scaling Floryns healing output. Glowing Wand provides consistent poke and helps apply pressure during fights while synergizing with her Skill 1. Blood Wings grants high magic power and a defensive shield, improving both healing strength and late-game survivability. Overall this build keeps Floryn alive while enabling constant high-value heals in objectives and late-game clashes.

data.recommend: Pick Floryn for strong sustain and late-game team fights, especially with dive heroes.

spell.spell_desc: Revitalize is ideal for Floryn because it stacks perfectly with her healing kit, turning team fights into sustain battles her team can win. Floryn already provides constant heals through Skill 1 and a global ultimate, and Revitalize adds a safe healing zone that compensates for her lack of mobility and squishiness. Its synergy is strongest when combined with her ultimate, which temporarily removes anti-heal effects, allowing Revitalize to heal at full value even against Necklace or Dominance. For best results dont cast Revitalize at the start—wait until allies are around half HP, after enemies commit their skills. Place it slightly behind the frontline or along retreat paths not where teammates will chase out. Used mid-fight or during objectives Revitalize provides clutch sustain zone control, and keeps Floryn impactful without overexposing herself.

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Let's dive into how Floryn synergizes with some of the top heroes in Mobile Legends! Floryn is the ultimate support hero, with her game-changing global healing ability, _Bloom_, and unique item-sharing mechanic via _Dew's Lantern_. She's like the heartbeat of your team, keeping everyone alive and kicking!

## Top Synergies
- *Tigreal*: This tank-hero duo is unstoppable! Tigreal initiates fights with his _Implosion_ and _Sacred Hammer_, stunning multiple enemies, while Floryn keeps him and the entire team alive with her heals and shields. It's like having a human shield with a permanent life support system!
- *Alucard*: Floryn's _Bloom_ is Alucard's lifeline, allowing him to dive into enemy lines fearlessly. With high lifesteal and damage, Alucard becomes nearly unkillable, thanks to Floryn's constant healing and item boosts via _Dew's Lantern_.
- *Paquito*: Paquito's aggressive playstyle and crowd control mesh perfectly with Floryn's sustain. She keeps him healthy while he disrupts enemy teams, creating a synergy of chaos and resilience!
- *Lancelot*: For this squishy yet deadly assassin, Floryn's heals are crucial. She enables Lancelot to safely engage the enemy backline, dealing massive damage while she keeps him alive from afar.
- *Angela*: This double-support duo is like an impenetrable fortress! Angela provides shields and healing with _Heartguard_, while Floryn adds global sustain with _Bloom_ and _Sow_, protecting high-value allies like marksmen or assassins.
- *Estes*: Estes and Floryn create a healing avalanche! Estes' _Blessing of Moon Goddess_ and _Moonlight Immersion_ combine with Floryn's _Bloom_ for relentless sustain, outlasting opponents in prolonged fights.
- *Harith*: Floryn keeps Harith alive during his daring dives with _Zaman Force_, allowing him to unleash bursts of damage. Her global heal saves him when he overextends, making them a fast-paced, hard-to-kill duo!
- *Vexana*: This magic duo blends burst damage with sustain. Vexana dishes out AoE

counters.counter_desc:
Floryn vs Rafaela - it's like a healing showdown in the Philippines' Mobile Legends arena! 🔥🇵🇭 Rafaela is a powerhouse support with crowd control (stuns, slows), massive healing for herself and teammates via _Holy Healing_, and true damage from _Deity Penalization_. But Floryn, with her unique global healing _Bloom_ and item-sharing _Dew's Lantern_, has some intense counters to Rafaela!

dominants.dominant_desc:
## Laning Precautions
1. *Tank Buddy*: Stick with *Tigreal* or *Grock* — your PH jungle shield

emblems.emblem_desc:
I choose the *Custom Support Emblem* for Floryn because it's like tailoring a bespoke suit for her unique support playstyle! 🔥 This setup hyper-optimizes her strengths, turning her into an unstoppable healing and synergy machine on the MLBB battlefield here in the Philippines, where intense team fights reign supreme!

## Breakdown
- *Tier 1: Agility* amps up Floryn's movement speed (2/4/6%), making her a nimble guardian who can swiftly reposition to where allies need her most — crucial in chaotic Pinoy MLBB matches! ⚡ She dodges ganks, reaches teammates faster, and stays responsive in split-second jungle rotations.
- *Tier 2: Pull Yourself Together* slashes spell cooldowns or boosts healing effects (3/6/10%), ensuring Floryn's _Bloom_ and _Sow_ keep flowing uninterrupted. In high-pressure tournaments like the MPL-PH, this means sustained team support, turning the tide during clutch moments like Lord or Turtle fights!
- *Tier 3: Focusing Mark* creates a domino effect: when Floryn tags an enemy, allies deal 6% more damage for 3 seconds. Pairing this with _Bloom_'s massive heal = allies burst enemies while being resuscitated! It's like orchestrating a symphony of healing and destruction, perfect for coordinated PH teams emphasizing synergy like the Blacklist International squad! 🎶

The *Custom Support Emblem* outshines alternatives because it's precision-crafted for Floryn's mechanics, blending mobility, relentless healing, and offensive amplification. *Support Emblem* adds survivability but lacks the aggressive synergy; *Mage Emblem* skews too damage-focused, sidelining Floryn's core healing role. For Philippine MLBB's dynamic, team-oriented play, *Custom Support Emblem* is Floryn's secret weapon! 💪 Want tweaks for specific PH tournaments or rival teams? 😊

equips.equip_desc:
I choose this build because it's like crafting a *masterpiece* specifically for Floryn's divine support essence! 🔥💖 I'm amplifying her into a supreme healing and synergy powerhouse, tailor-fit for the *fiery Philippine MLBB scene*, where teamwork and split-second decisions reign! 🇵🇭

## Deep Dive
- *Agility (Tier 1)* turbocharges Floryn's mobility (2/4/6%), morphing her into a *lightning-fast guardian*! ⚡ She pirouettes through chaotic Pinoy battles, dodging sneaky Claude ganks, sprinting to distressed junglers during Turtle skirmishes, and harmonizing with Blacklist International's precision rotations! 📍
- *Pull Yourself Together (Tier 2)* obliterates cooldowns or magnifies heals (3/6/10%), ensuring Floryn's _Bloom_ and _Sow_ cascade uninterrupted! In MPL-PH showdowns, this fuels *unstoppable team resilience*, flipping scripts during Lord clashes or Execration vs. RSG duels! 🏆 Her heals become a relentless symphony!
- *Focusing Mark (Tier 3)* ignites a *domino explosion*: Floryn tags an enemy, allies unleash 6% amplified damage for 3 seconds! Coupled with _Bloom_'s map-wide resuscitation, allies *burst* foes while being revived! 🎶 It's orchestrated chaos, mirroring the lethal synergy of PH's top squads like Smart Omega, crushing opponents with healing-fueled aggression!

*Custom Support Emblem* demolishes alternatives! *Support Emblem* adds bulk but misses this *synergistic aggression*; *Mage Emblem* skews to damage, betraying Floryn's healing soul! For PH's dynamic, cohesive gameplay — where teams like Onic PH dictate pace — *Custom Support Emblem* is Floryn's *ultimate katana*, slicing through battles with healing mastery! 💪🔪 Want me to hyper-tune this for MPL-PH Season 12 or clash against Bren Esports? 😈🇵🇭?

hero.hero_overview:
Floryn is the ultimate support hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (MLBB), introduced during the game's 5th anniversary celebration, and she's been turning heads ever since! Imagine having a teammate who's like a walking healing station, but with a twist — she's got magic, crowd control, and damage-dealing skills to boot!

## Key Abilities
- *Passive - Dew*: Floryn carries a permanent item called Lantern of Hope, which shares buffs with allies and evolves over time, boosting her magic power, movement speed, and cooldown reduction. This lantern can even be shared with a teammate at the fountain, giving them an extra equipment slot!
- *Skill 1 - Sow*: Floryn tosses an Energy Seed at an enemy, dealing magic damage (220-420, scaling with magic power) and spawning Healing Fruits that bounce to nearby allies, restoring HP (50-150, plus 5% of their lost HP).
- *Skill 2 - Sprout*: Floryn unleashes a blob of energy, dealing magic damage (225-500) and stunning enemies for 1 second upon impact or reaching max range, with an additional explosion radius damage (135-300).
- *Ultimate - Bloom*: This game-changer provides a map-wide heal to all allies twice (400-520 HP, scaling with magic power), while dealing magic damage (300-390) and slowing enemies around allies by 30% for 0.8 seconds. The Evolved Lantern even grants allies immunity to HP regen and shield reduction effects for 3 seconds!

## Playstyle and Strategy
Floryn shines in the backline, monitoring ally health and timing her heals perfectly. Positioning is key — a well-placed Sprout can disrupt the enemy core, while Bloom should be activated early in team fights to maximize healing. Share the Lantern with your jungler or gold laner for maximum effectiveness ¹ ² ³!

## Builds and Emblems
For Floryn's build, focus on mana regen, cooldown reduction, and hybrid defense. Core items include:
- *Tough Boots - Favor*: Boosts movement speed, magic defense, and healing effects.
- *Fleeting Time*: Reduces ultimate cooldown by 30% wit
hero.hero_strength:
Floryn is an absolute powerhouse in Mobile Legends, especially as a support hero! Her strength lies in her *Global Healing Ability*, where she can restore HP to all allies across the entire map, regardless of their location. Imagine being able to save your teammates from anywhere on the battlefield — that's Floryn for you! This capability makes her invaluable in sustaining team fights and keeping allies in the game.

## Key Strengths
- *Unique Supporting Mechanics*: Floryn's passive, _Dew_, gives her a special item called _Lantern of Hope_ that evolves over time, boosting her stats and allowing her to share it with a teammate for an extra equipment slot and bonus stats.
- *Strong Team Protection*: Her _Sow_ skill heals nearby allies while dealing magic damage to enemies, and _Bloom_ (her ultimate) heals all allies twice, removes healing reduction effects, and even grants immunity.
- *Crowd Control*: _Sprout_ stuns enemies, revealing their location and setting up plays for her team.

## Optimal Build and Emblems
For maximum impact, Floryn's core build includes:
- *Demon Boots*: For mana regen and movement speed.
- *Flask of the Oasis*: Boosts healing effects, magic power, HP, and cooldown reduction.
- *Glowing Wand*: Adds magic power, HP, and movement speed.
- *Fleeting Time*: Reduces _Bloom_'s cooldown with kills or assists.
- *Immortality*: Ensures survivability against physical damage.

Her best emblem setup is _Custom Support Emblem_ with:
- *Tier 1: Agility*: Enhances movement speed.
- *Tier 2: Pull Yourself Together*: Reduces spell cooldowns.
- *Tier 3: Focusing Mark*: Amplifies allies' damage on tagged enemies.

## Playstyle and Synergies
Floryn shines with coordinated teams, especially pairing with damage-dealers like *Alucard*, *Paquito*, or *Lancelot*, allowing them to dive into enemy lines fearlessly. She's easy to pick up but requires timing and positioning mastery. Communicate with teammates for optimal rotations and objective control ¹ ² ³!

## Counters
hero.hero_weakness:
Floryn's weaknesses are pretty crucial to understand if you want to master her or counter her effectively in Mobile Legends! Let's break them down.

## Key Weaknesses
- *No Area Attack*: Floryn lacks an area-of-effect (AoE) attack, making her less effective against multiple enemies at once. Her stun ability in _Sprout_ only activates if she hits an enemy directly, which can be tricky.
- *No Escape Mechanism*: Floryn doesn't have any escape skills, making her super vulnerable to assassins like Natalia or Claude. Her slow movement speed doesn't help, so relying on tankers for protection is a must!
- *High Team Dependency*: Floryn's gameplay heavily relies on her team, especially tankers, to cover her. Solo play isn't her forte; she needs coordination with teammates for optimal performance.
- *Vulnerable to Burst*: With growth support, Floryn's HP is low, making her easy to burst down. Even tanky builds aren't super effective against high-damage heroes.
- *CC Ability Limitations*: Floryn's crowd control (stun) is quick but not game-changing. Enemies can easily run away afterward.
- *Easy to Counter*: Heroes like *Yu Zhong*, *Ruby*, *Akai*, *Tigreal*, *Kagura*, *Luo Yi*, and *Claude* can counter Floryn effectively due to their damage, crowd control, or mobility. For instance, Yu Zhong's deadly damage and chase ability make him a nightmare for Floryn.
- *Poke Not Quite Enough*: Floryn's poke from _Sow_ is somewhat underwhelming in terms of damage and scaling, requiring good communication with teammates to time advances or retreats.
- *Needs Early Lead*: Floryn and her team must gain an early advantage; otherwise, she'd struggle in mid to late game, especially against anti-heal strategies.

## Countering Floryn
If you're facing Floryn, consider picking heroes with strong burst damage, mobility, or crowd control. *Kagura*, with her versatile skills, can easily take down Floryn from any distance. *Tigreal* locks down multiple heroes, trapping Floryn. *Claude*, with maximal

data.recommend: Here's a *sizzling recommendation* for my guide, straight from the heart of the Philippines 🇵🇭

spell.spell_desc:
Revitalize is a game-changer of a spell for Floryn, but honestly, it's not the top recommendation for her. Think of Revitalize as creating an area-of-effect healing zone around you — it's like you're a walking oasis, pouring healing energy into your allies nearby, amplifying your already impressive healing output. When paired with Floryn's passive, _Dew_, which grants additional healing and shields through the _Lantern of Hope_, Revitalize can be a powerhouse in intense team fights, keeping your squad alive and kicking ¹ ²!

However, most guides suggest *Flicker* as Floryn's go-to spell, providing crucial repositioning or escape options from assassins like Natalia or Claude, who love to sneak up on squishy supports. *Purify* is another solid choice if you're facing enemies with heavy crowd control, helping you break free to keep healing. Revitalize, while potent in healing, doesn't offer the mobility or defensive utility that Flicker or Purify does, which is why it's considered a secondary option² ³

If you using this kind of item, Stay close to your teammates to provide healing and support especially during the early game your first priority is you need to support first your Marksman because you're both squishy type hero they need your help so that they have benefits at the early and gain more item for them then if they have advantage you have enough time to buy 4 crystals.

Position safely behind your allies to avoid getting caught or killed early, if the enemy has a set type heroes like Atlas or Tigreal ... ect. Then you need this method if you have no "Purify"

If Floryn cannot reach her ally, remember that her first skill has a long range. Use it on nearby creeps or side creeps within her range. Even if you are far away, the skill can still reach your ally and provide support.

Use your ultimate skill wisely to heal teammates across the map during fights or emergencies

Always watch the map to know when your team needs help even if they are far

Give the crystal blessing to the strongest damage dealer on your team to boost their power

Do not wander alone focus on team play and stay close to your core heroes

Use your basic attacks and skills to poke enemies but do not overextend

Time your heals to save allies during fights or while escaping

Stay aware of your surroundings and reposition if enemies are nearby

Practice timing and awareness to make the most of your healing and support skills

emblems.emblem_desc:
Inspire gives 5 percent cooldown reduction. This helps Floryn use her skills, especially her Ultimate, more often.

Optional Talents

Wilder Blessings - Helps Floryn rotate faster, but only works when passing through the jungle river.
Bargain Hunter - Reduces item cost by 95 percent, allowing you to complete items faster
Temporal Reign- Decrease your Ult. faster.

Some players use Temporal Reign to reduce Floryn's Ultimate cooldown even more. However, since this build focuses on reaching 5000+ healing, it is not required. Temporal Reign only activates in close range team fights and needs assists to trigger. This makes it risky, especially since Floryn is easy to eliminate. If you choose this, build defensive items to stay alive longer.

equips.equip_desc: It may be impossible to achieve 4 crystals in a ranked game, but if you're lucky, this item can provide over 5k healing for Floryn.

Demon Boots with Favor:Helps sustain Mana and provides healing to allies.

Flask of the Oasis:Grants a shield to nearby teammates.

Guardian Helmet: Offers early game defense and HP regeneration.

Oracle: Increases HP regeneration and boosts shield effect to your passive , Since Support Attributes Emblem has already 12% healing effect it can stronger your healing support even you are tanky build Floryn.  It can strong your heal by 30%


Optional Defensive Items

Use Athena's Shield if the enemy has high magic burst damage.

Use Radiant Armor if the enemy deals continuous magic damage.

Use Antique Cuirass if the enemy focuses on physical burst damage.

Twilight Armor helps reduce incoming burst damage from enemies.

This build may not help you reach 5k+ healing, but it greatly improves your support and survivability. If you choose this build, switch your battle emblem to Pull Yourself Together and use the Temporal Reign talent.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Suyou and Floryn are considered a good pairing in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (MLBB) because Suyou's ability to reduce damage, especially in his Immortal form, complements Floryn's role as a support hero focused on healing and sustain. Floryn's healing and magic damage, while helpful, can be countered by heroes like Baxia, making Suyou's defensive capabilities valuable for protecting Floryn and the team.

counters.counter_desc: Gusion and Floryn make a good combination in Mobile Legends because Floryn's healing and support abilities can keep Gusion alive and enable him to burst down enemies with his high damage. Floryn's ultimate, Bloom, can save Gusion in the thick of battle by providing a massive heal, especially against burst-heavy enemies. Gusion's high mobility and burst damage can also help Floryn secure kills and assist her in racking up assists

Lylia is considered a counter to Floryn in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang primarily because of her strong burst damage and ability to disrupt Floryn's healing and sustain. Floryn's healing relies on her ability to passively regenerate health and the ability to create a field that heals allies, Lylia's skills can quickly nullify Floryn's healing and damage her quickly.

dominants.dominant_desc: Floryn, a pure support hero, excels at healing and shielding teammates while also providing a 7th item boost. Her kit revolves around maximizing team synergy, particularly during team fights. Effective Floryn play involves strategic use of skills, map awareness, and understanding when to give the Flower of Hope.

emblems.emblem_desc: This combo maximizes her healing capabilities and roaming effectiveness while also providing essential utility in team fights.

equips.equip_desc: increasing her magic power, healing, and CD reduction to maximize her support capabilities. This build prioritizes healing and magic damage while also ensuring her skills can be used frequently.

spell.spell_desc: Purify as a battle spell because her kit, while strong in healing and crowd control, can be vulnerable to enemy crowd control effects. While her ultimate removes healing reduction effects, Purify can be used to remove other debuffs and prevent being caught in crowd control, allowing her to continue healing and supporting her team.

equips.equip_desc: Floryn is a squishy hero so we need to put a defense item so that the enemies cannot put you down so easily:)

hero.hero_overview: Floryn is a pure support hero focused on healing and boosting her allies. With her global healing and item-sharing passive, she's a reliable backbone in teamfights and helps your team sustain longer in fights or pushes. She doesn't need to recall often and supports well even when far from her team.
hero.hero_strength: floryn is strong because of her global ult and unique passive that removing anti heal plus the long range skills
hero.hero_weakness: She's very easy to kill if caught out of position. She's also heavily team-dependent, without good teammates, her Impact is limited since she can't carry on her own. Her crowd control skill requires good aim, and if missed, she loses a key part of her defense. Early in the game, she can be mana-hungry, which limits her healing. Lastly, she needs good positioning at all times because she lacks escape skills. A single mistake can cost her life and hurt the team.
